allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Complete Reverse Dictionary application

- Next.js 14 with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- Claude AI integration for reverse dictionary lookups
- Beautiful, responsive UI with dark mode support
- Example queries and usage examples
- Comprehensive error handling
- Production-ready with Vercel deployment config

Features:
- AI-powered word search from concept descriptions
- Real-time results with definitions and examples
- Alternative word suggestions
- Mobile-responsive design
- Full documentation and deployment guides

EOF
)")
